summary: TWO_COLUMN: Picard iteration for y'=y, y(0)=1. LEFT axes with GREY e^t reference + YELLOW φ_k curve via always_redraw. ValueTracker k_tr walks k=0..8 — φ_k = Σ_{j=0}^k t^j/j! Taylor partial sums. RIGHT has live polynomial formula rebuilt per frame + sup-norm error on [0, 1.5] shrinking toward 0.
